flaws.description: The agent failed to produce the required implementation artifact (background scheduler for StatutoryDeadline events) and terminated execution with a tool configuration error instead of resolving it or providing the implementation.
flaws.evidence: No output parser registered for backing tool: DBOS Cron / PostgreSQL
